positive: An intricate, neo-art deco celestial tapestry featuring a central, highly stylized crescent moon surrounded by swirling galaxies, constellations formed by vibrant emerald green and deep sapphire blue stellar dust, and abstract, bioluminescent flora resembling stylized ferns. The overall composition is a powerful, symmetrical emblem suitable for a chest print, utilizing thick, clean black linework contrasting sharply with the iridescent glow of the celestial elements. Minimalism meets cosmic grandeur. High contrast, golden ratio composition, vector art style, screen printing aesthetic, negative space utilization, isolated on a solid dark background.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifact, grain, messy, clutter, muted color, photorealism, low contrast
